histogramMeta.formula: hist[b] = count_b / sum(counts) for the same timestep
histogramMeta.comparability: Each timestep sums to 1.0; cross-step comparison is valid for shape, not for absolute counts.
histogramMeta.bin_edges: global log-spaced edges from min/max over all 100 steps

dataScope.note: Competition package ships uniform 128³ gas .dat only; no per-step dark-matter particle or DM density grid.
